title: 03 — Architecture
summary: Authoritative component and data-flow map for DebateOS: resolver (native+WASM), CLI, Debate UI, translators, build backends, registry, and the optional Forum service.
scope: Registry (YAML in GitHub repos + static Pages index)
The Forum (Go chi + SQLite discovery service)
notes: Manifest declared type SPEC; content corroborates (component stack, data-flow contract, technical invariants such as rule-based-not-SAT resolver and dual compile targets). Doc states its technical choices are locked with rationale in 09-decisions.md, but it is not an ADR itself so locked remains false.
